To get SPY portfolio composition data from SEC filings, search for the fund's latest prospectus, annual report (10-K equivalent for funds), or semi-annual/annual report filed with the SEC under the fund's CIK number. Try searching for "SPY holdings" or "State Street Global Advisors" combined with specific SEC form types like "N-CSRS" or "N-1A" which contain detailed portfolio holdings information.
